    #didomi-host {
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    }
    #didomi-host a:not(.didomi-no-link-style) {
      text-decoration: underline;
      color: #000000 !important;

    /* Buttons Styles*/

/* Common css elements */

.didomi-button{
    border-width: 0px !important;
    border-radius: 30px !important;
}

#buttons{
    display: flex !important;
    justify-content: space-between !important;
    padding: 20px 50px 50px !important;
}

/* 1st Layer button > Agree */
#didomi-notice-agree-button {
    background-color: #CE0000 !important;
    color:#FFFFFF !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    order: 3 !important; 
}

/* 1st Layer button > Disagree */
#didomi-notice-disagree-button { 
    background-color: #9a3434 !important;
    color:#FFFFFF !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    order: 2; 
} 

/* 1st Layer button > More Info */
#didomi-notice-learn-more-button{
    background-color: #f0f0f0 !important;
    color:#333333 !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    order: 1 !important; 
}

/* 2nd Layer button > Agree */
.didomi-components-radio__option.didomi-components-radio__option--agree {
    background-color: #CE0000 !important;
    color: #FFFFFF !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3) !important;
    padding: 11.5px;
}

/* 2nd Layer button > Disagree */
.didomi-components-radio__option.didomi-components-radio__option--disagree {
    background-color: #9a3434 !important;
    color: #FFFFFF !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 0.3) !important;
    padding: 11.5px;
}

/* Other Buttons */
.didomi-button-highlight{
    background-color: #CE0000 !important;
}

/*********************************************************************/

/* Consent Notice */
#didomi-host {
    width: auto;
}
#didomi-host .didomi-screen-xsmall .didomi-notice-popup.didomi-support-full-height .didomi-exterior-border .didomi-popup-container .didomi-popup-view #buttons button:first-child {
    margin-top: 10px !important;
}

div#didomi-host #didomi-notice { 
    visibility: visible!important; 
    transform: translateY(-100%);
    animation-name: didomi_animate;
    animation-duration: 1s;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}
    
div#didomi-host #didomi-popup { 
    visibility: visible!important; 
    transform: translateY(-100%);
    animation-name: didomi_animate;
    animation-duration: 1s;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}
div#didomi-popup { 
    visibility: visible!important; 
    transform: translateY(-100%);
    animation-name: didomi_animate;
    animation-duration: 1s;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

div#didomi-popup { 
    visibility: visible!important; 
    transform: translateY(-100%);
    animation-name: didomi_animate;
    animation-duration: 1s;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}
    

.blockNavigation {
    visibility: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    animation-name: didomi_fadein;
    animation-duration: .5s;
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}
    
@keyframes didomi_animate {
    from { transform: translateY(-100%); } 
    to { transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes didomi_fadein {
    from { opacity:0; visibility:hidden; } 
    to { opacity:1; visibility:visible; }
}

@media screen and (min-width: 600px) {
#didomi-host .didomi-popup-backdrop {
    background-color: hsla(0, 0%, 10%, 0) !important;
}


#didomi-host .didomi-exterior-border {
    box-shadow: 7px 10px 28px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 00) !important;
}

#didomi-host .didomi-popup-container {
    border: 0 !important;
    border-radius: 0px !important;
}

#didomi-host .didomi-popup-footer {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(139, 185, 212, 0);
}

#didomi-host #didomi-notice {
    background: #f8f8f8 !important;
    color: #666 !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    box-shadow: 2px -3px 14px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
    padding: 2em 4em !important;
}

#didomi-host #didomi-notice #buttons button.didomi-button-standard {
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
}

#didomi-host #didomi-notice #buttons button.didomi-button-highlight {
    text-decoration: none !important;
}

#didomi-host .didomi-consent-popup-information .didomi-consent-popup-body {
    max-height: 600px !important;
}

#didomi-host .didomi-consent-popup-body__title span {
    display: none;
}
}
@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    .tittleDidomi{
        display: none
    };
    #didomi-host .didomi-popup-backdrop {
    background-color: hsla(0, 0%, 10%, 0) !important;
}


    #didomi-host .didomi-mobile #didomi-notice.didomi-regular-notice .didomi-notice__interior-border {padding: 0.2em 0.2em !important;}#didomi-host #didomi-notice.didomi-regular-notice {line-height: 1.2em !important;} #didomi-host #didomi-notice {padding: 1em 1.8em !important; font-size: 11px !important;}
       /* styles for mobile browsers smaller than 480px; (iPhone) */
    
/*    #didomi-host .didomi-mobile #didomi-notice.didomi-regular-notice .didomi-notice__interior-border {
        padding: 0em 1em !important;
    }*/
    }

.custom-header {
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: grid !important;
    align-items: center;
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
    grid-template-columns: 0.3fr 1fr;
    grid-template-areas: "company-logo privacy-title";
    gap: 20px;
}

.company-logo {
    grid-area: company-logo;
    width: 100%;
}

.privacy-title {
    grid-area: privacy-title;  
    margin-bottom: 0px !important;
    font-size: 2rem;
    line-height: 1;
    text-align: center !important;
}


@media (min-width: 320px) and (max-width: 480px) {
    .title {
        grid-area: title;  
        margin-bottom: 0px !important;
        font-size: 2rem;
        line-height: 1;
